---
title: 'Title' # TODO: Update website title
description: 'purpose, company, etc' # TODO: Update website description
author: # TODO: Update authors
  - "{{< var author-wassmer >}}"
  - "{{< var author-pahlke >}}"
  - "{{< var author-sabanes >}}"
affiliation: "RPACT"
date: yyyy-mm-dd # TODO: Update date
date-format: long
institute: "[RPACT](https://www.rpact.com)"
image: figures/logos/logo_full.png
lang: en
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 120
---

<!-- TODO: Update welcome message here. -->
**Welcome to ...** 

<!-- TODO: Update URL -->
This website is accessible at
[presentation.company.year.rpact.com](https://presentation.company.year.rpact.com).

**Details**

<!-- TODO: Update date, presenter, time, location and agenda. -->
- 🗓 Date: yyyy-mm-dd 
- 🧑‍💻 Presenter: First Last 
  ([RPACT GmbH](https://www.rpact.com))
- 🕒 Time: 2:00 PM –  5:30 PM CET (Germany)
- 📍 Location: 


## [{{< fa calendar-check >}}]{.yellow} Agenda

|               |                                                                             |
|---------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------| 
| 14:00 - 14:30 | [Title 1](/parts/01_title1.qmd)                 | 
| 14:30 - 15:00 | [Title 2](/parts/02_title2.qmd)                 |
